channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: America's 250th Anniversary Falls on Shabbat. That's Fitting
item.description: The nation's founders repeatedly drew inspiration from the same ancient source.

item.title: SCOTUS Ruling on Birth Tourism Demands Legal System Overhaul
item.description: A court with six Republican-appointed justices issued a decision critics call un-American, highlighting systemic issues in the legal system.

item.title: Tucker Carlson Hints at Third Political Party Launch
item.description: Tucker Carlson says he will work to create a new political party focused on prioritizing U.S. citizens over foreign relations.

item.title: AOC Takes a Risky Political Gamble
item.description: Her endorsement of Abdul El-Sayed is a high-risk move with uncertain outcomes.
